'''tovafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetid|foetid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetid|foetid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tovafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovafithi|tovafithi]] || [[word:tovafiji|tovafiji]] || [[word:tovafishi|tovafishi]] || [[word:tovafiki|tovafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovafuthuthu|tovafuthuthu]] || [[word:tovafujuju|tovafujuju]] || [[word:tovafushushu|tovafushushu]] || [[word:tovafukuku|tovafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovafuthu|tovafuthu]] || [[word:tovafuju|tovafuju]] || [[word:tovafushu|tovafushu]] || [[word:tovafuku|tovafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovafufthuf|tovafufthuf]] || [[word:tovafufjuf|tovafufjuf]] || [[word:tovafufshuf|tovafufshuf]] || [[word:tovafufkuf|tovafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovafethe|tovafethe]] || [[word:tovafeje|tovafeje]] || [[word:tovafeshe|tovafeshe]] || [[word:tovafeke|tovafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovafothotho|tovafothotho]] || [[word:tovafojojo|tovafojojo]] || [[word:tovafoshosho|tovafoshosho]] || [[word:tovafokoko|tovafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovafotho|tovafotho]] || [[word:tovafojo|tovafojo]] || [[word:tovafosho|tovafosho]] || [[word:tovafoko|tovafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovafofthof|tovafofthof]] || [[word:tovafofjof|tovafofjof]] || [[word:tovafofshof|tovafofshof]] || [[word:tovafofkof|tovafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfthÃŸf|tovafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfjÃŸf|tovafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfshÃŸf|tovafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfkÃŸf|tovafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|tovafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|tovafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|tovafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|tovafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfthÃŸf|tovafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfjÃŸf|tovafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfshÃŸf|tovafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfkÃŸf|tovafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfthÃŸf|tovafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfjÃŸf|tovafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfshÃŸf|tovafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tovafÃŸfkÃŸf|tovafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovafÃḊthÃḊ|tovafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:tovafÃḊjÃḊ|tovafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:tovafÃḊshÃḊ|tovafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:tovafÃḊkÃḊ|tovafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovafathatha|tovafathatha]] || [[word:tovafajaja|tovafajaja]] || [[word:tovafashasha|tovafashasha]] || [[word:tovafakaka|tovafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovafatha|tovafatha]] || [[word:tovafaja|tovafaja]] || [[word:tovafasha|tovafasha]] || [[word:tovafaka|tovafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovafafthaf|tovafafthaf]] || [[word:tovafafjaf|tovafafjaf]] || [[word:tovafafshaf|tovafafshaf]] || [[word:tovafafkaf|tovafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tovafasha|tovafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovafshÃḋsha|tovafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovafrosha|tovafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovafmusha|tovafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovafyasha|tovafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovafnkshÃḋsha|gotovafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovafnkrosha|gotovafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovafnkmusha|gotovafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovafnkyasha|gotovafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tovavafasha|tovavafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovavafshÃḋsha|tovavafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovavafrosha|tovavafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovavafmusha|tovavafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovavafyasha|tovavafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovavafnkshÃḋsha|gotovavafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovavafnkrosha|gotovavafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovavafnkmusha|gotovavafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovavafnkyasha|gotovavafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tevÃḊfasha|tevÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tevÃḊfshÃḋsha|tevÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tevÃḊfrosha|tevÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tevÃḊfmusha|tevÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tevÃḊfyasha|tevÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotevÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gotevÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotevÃḊfnkrosha|gotevÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotevÃḊfnkmusha|gotevÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotevÃḊfnkyasha|gotevÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tovfafasha|tovfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovfafshÃḋsha|tovfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovfafrosha|tovfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovfafmusha|tovfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovfafyasha|tovfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovfafnkshÃḋsha|gotovfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovfafnkrosha|gotovfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovfafnkmusha|gotovfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovfafnkyasha|gotovfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
